title: AI Memory Phase 0 Implementation (read-only)
body:
## Objective
Implement Phase 0 of AI Memory in **read-only** mode, aligned with approved canonical docs.

## Canonical References
- docs/ai-memory-learning-architecture-2026-03-04.md
- docs/ai-memory-phase0-checklist-2026-03-04.md
- docs/ai-memory-canonical-approvals-checklist-2026-03-04.md
- docs/ai-memory-canonical-decisions-2026-03-04.md

## Scope (Phase 0 only)
- Memory Retriever in read-only mode
- Manual Decision/Incident logging workflow
- Retrieval audit logging for quality tuning
- KPI baseline + 2-week pilot measurement

## Explicit Out of Scope
- Auto code/config changes
- Auto merge/deploy
- Auto checklist/policy writes

## Canonical Decisions Applied
- Embedding model: `text-embedding-3-large`
- Embedding dimension: `3072`
- Retention and privacy constraints per canonical decisions doc
- Full-access temporary RBAC for 2 approved users

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Read-only retriever path works behind feature flag
2. No runtime write side effects outside approved memory store
3. Audit trail is present for all memory write actions
4. KPI baseline recorded and pilot metrics tracked
5. Rollback dry-run documented and PASS

## Deliverables
- Technical implementation plan split into tasks
- Guard/rollback checklist tied to deployment flow
- Pilot report template for weekly review

## Notes
Keep rollout gated. No Phase 1 promotion without meeting gate criteria from the canonical docs.
